name: Mobile Mode - serve the mobile site on desktop
description: Toolbar toggle that rewrites the User-Agent + UA client hints to a phone, so sites (Facebook, YouTube, …) serve their real mobile interface in your desktop browser. This is the companion a userscript can't be: a userscript cannot change a navigation's User-Agent (the browser sets it before any page script runs - see the 301 from m.facebook.com); an extension can.
